positive: A central, intricate graphic design featuring a stylized celestial fox amidst blooming bioluminescent jungle flora. The artwork should utilize clean, deep silhouettes and strong geometric contrasts. Color palette must be limited to deep sapphire blues, ethereal teal accents, burnished gold outlines, and deep indigo backgrounds. The style should mimic sophisticated linocut engraving meets contemporary vector illustration, with visible negative space for high print contrast. Composition must be perfectly centered, designed to wrap or print cleanly onto fabric, suitable for an apparel motif. Extreme detail in the leaves and fox's fur texture, but maintaining a crisp, graphic edge.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, poorly drawn, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, noise, grain, grayscale, photorealistic
